overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in winter clothing walking through a heavy snowstorm in a mountainous forest wilderness. A wolf appears in the latter part of the clip and follows the character through the deep snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field approaching forest edge

events.description: character walks between two large snow-covered pine trees entering the forest proper

agents.ego_description: character in heavy winter coat with rifle on back walking steadily through deep snow toward the tree line, leaving footprints

entered.detail: two prominent tall pine trees covered in heavy snow acting as a gateway to the forest
deep snow covering the ground with visible footprints trailing behind the character
large snow-covered mountain slope visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast snow-covered field toward a pair of prominent snow-laden pine trees that mark the forest entrance. Heavy snowfall reduces visibility, with a snowy mountain barely visible through the fog to the right. The camera follows steadily as the character approaches and passes between the twin trees.

agents.ego_description: navigating through the forest interior between closely spaced snow-covered pine trees

entered.detail: thick tree trunk with rough bark partially covered in snow passing by on the right
dense cluster of snow-covered pine trees forming the forest wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the dense pine forest, surrounded by snow-laden trees on all sides. The forest canopy partially blocks the sky while snow continues to fall. The character walks between the trees, leaving a trail in the untouched snow as the open field and landmark trees disappear behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge with forest edge

events.description: wolf emerges from the fog on the right side and begins following the character's path

agents.ego_description: walking along the snowy ridge with rifle ready, aware of the wolf following behind

notable_agents.action: wolf running through deep snow following the character's trail

entered.detail: large boulder partially buried in snow on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a snowy mountain ridge with the pine forest now lining only the left side and open mountain slopes visible to the right. At approximately 50 seconds, a wolf appears in the distance on the right and begins following the character through the deep snow. The mountain terrain becomes more prominent as the character continues along the ridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, open snowfield into a dense forest and finally onto a rugged mountain ridge. It begins with the character trekking through heavy snowfall toward a pair of prominent, snow-laden pine trees that mark the entrance to the woods. As the character passes between these twin trees, the scene shifts into a thick pine forest where the canopy partially obscures the sky and the open field disappears behind a wall of white. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the trees onto a snowy ridge, where the forest recedes to the left to reveal expansive mountain slopes on the right. Finally, a wolf appears in the distance and begins following the character through the deep snow as the mountain terrain becomes increasingly prominent.
